# 👋 Welcome

Basta is an **API-first ecommerce engine** designed to power auctions on your platform.

Whether you’re building a marketplace, powering high-frequency bidding, or enabling custom pricing flows — these docs will guide your integration from zero to production.

🚀

## Quick Start

> 📘 New to Basta?
>
> Start here to understand how the platform works, set up your account, and get your first integration running.

- [👉 Getting Started with Basta](https://docs.basta.app/getting-started-with-basta) _Sign up, create your business account, and issue your first API key._

- [🔐 API Access](https://docs.basta.app/api-access) _Authentication headers, JWT bidder tokens, and key management._

* * *
